title: selaginella propinqua
intro: Selaginella propinqua, also known as the Australian spikemoss, is a type of small, delicate, and non-vascular plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits associated with Selaginella propinqua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella propinqua is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
